title: Amtech S4145 12 Piece flat tip art brush set
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: FLAT TIPS: An assortment of 12 paint brushes with flat tips, ranging in length from 22-24cm.
WOODEN HANDLES: With sizes imprinted on each
VERSATILE: Ideal for hobbyists, craft work and painting models
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 12x Brush See more
